title: AgentGPT Protocol Envelope
description: Base envelope for every message: host<->sidecar NDJSON (stdio) and UI<->host WebSocket. Versioned per source plan section 16.

protocol.description: Protocol version. Mismatched major versions are rejected at handshake.

request_id.description: Correlates requests, responses, and event streams. UUIDv7 recommended.

sequence.description: Monotonic per request_id; present on streaming events only.
